text:
OGA
One born with Yava Yoga will observe fasts and other religious rules, be intent on doing
auspicious acts, be happy in the middle of life, be liberal and will have lasting wealth.
28. KAMALA YOGA.
One born with Kamala Yoga will be highly famous, very virtuous, assuredly long living, very rich,
very bright in appearance and will be the Lord of the earth.
29. VAPI YOGA.
One born with Vapi Yoga will be skillful in amassing wealth, will enjoy lasting riches and
happiness, be beautiful and will be endowed with happiness from sons.
30. SAKATA YOGA.
One born with Sakata Yoga will be troubled by diseases, will have a bad wife, will be a dunce, will
live by pulling carts, will be poor and be without relatives and friends.
31. VIHAGA YOGA. (PAKSHI YOGA).
The native with this Yoga will be intent on wandering, will have mean habits, will be a messenger,
will live through sexual dealings, shameless and fond of quarrels.
32. GADA YOGA.
